title: StoreHeadConsistency
description: An RFC 6962 consistency proof that a later chp-store-head-v2 Merkle tree is an append-only extension of an earlier one (chp-v0.2.md section 12, proposal 0022). A party holding only the two signed/anchored roots and this proof verifies, with no leaves snapshot and no witness, that between the two heads the log only appended: recompute both the old root (first_size) and the new root (second_size) from the proof's subtree hashes and check they equal first_root and second_root. Any dropped, altered, or reordered old leaf makes the recomputed old root diverge and verification fails.

scheme.description: The store-head scheme this proof is for (RFC 6962 Merkle).

first_size.description: The number of leaves in the earlier tree (must be <= second_size).

second_size.description: The number of leaves in the later tree.

first_root.description: The earlier tree's Merkle root (must equal the earlier anchored head's store_head).

second_root.description: The later tree's Merkle root (must equal the later anchored head's store_head).

proof.description: The RFC 6962 section 2.1.2 consistency proof: subtree node hashes from which both roots are recomputed. Empty when first_size == second_size and the roots match.
